---
title: Co-activity gradients
jupyter: python3
---

### Set up and get data

```{python}

## Import modules
import os
import abct
import numpy as np
from scipy import io
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.subplots as sp

## Unpack data
dir_data = os.path.join(".", "data") + "/"
data = io.loadmat(dir_data + "hcp_data.mat")
W = data["connectivity"]
X = data["activity"]
C = X.T @ X

k = 5           # Number of components 
repl = 100      # Number of replicates

```

### Co-activity gradients

```{python}

# Weighted gradients
V = abct.kneicomps(C, k, "weighted")

# Binary gradients
V_bin = abct.kneicomps(C, k, "binary")

```

### Residual degree

```{python}
d_ = abct.degrees(C, "residual")
```
